title: U.S. launches airstrikes against Iran after Tehran attacks container ship in Hormuz, Pentagon says
summary: The U.S. military launched airstrikes against Iran following Tehran's attack on a container ship in the Strait of Hormuz, according to Pentagon statements. Iran has been attacking vessels using a southern route protected by U.S. military forces and is demanding they instead transit through a northern corridor controlled by Iran. The escalation underscores rising tensions over control of a critical global shipping lane.
content: Iran has attacked ships using a route along Oman's coast protected by the U.S. military. Tehran demands vessels use a northern route through its waters.

zh.title: 美国对伊朗发动空袭，五角大楼称伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡攻击集装箱船
zh.summary: 美国军方对伊朗发动空袭，此前德黑兰在霍尔木兹海峡攻击了一艘集装箱船，五角大楼发表声明称。伊朗一直在攻击通过由美国军事力量保护的南部路线的船只，并要求他们改为通过由伊朗控制的北部走廊。这一升级加剧了对这一关键全球航道控制权的紧张局势。
